description: Front-end VIX stress detector. VIX9D > VIX > VIX3M (full backwardation) + persistence >=3d + spread z>=+1.5 + VVIX confirmation. Generates SVXY long / SPY long (statistical bottom) / VIX call spread tickets. Andersen-Bondarenko 2014, Park 2015, Cheng 2019. ~70% hit / +3.5% SPY / 10d. Daily 21:30 UTC.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: VIX9D-VIX front-end inversion detector daily 21:30 UTC
